record.field: A fast, lightweight self-hosted dashboard that brings all your feeds and information into a single clean page.

A fast, lightweight self-hosted dashboard that brings all your feeds and information into a single clean page.

Glance is a Go application that aggregates RSS feeds, news, weather, market data, calendar events, server status and more into a customizable YAML-configured dashboard. It ships as a single small binary with no database and no external dependencies, so it runs comfortably even on low-power hardware like a Raspberry Pi. Its appeal is doing one thing well: a homepage that surfaces what you care about without bloat.

Key features
  • Many built-in widgets: RSS, Hacker News, Reddit, Lobsters, YouTube, Twitch, weather, markets, calendar, GitHub/GitLab/Docker Hub releases and more
  • Server and Docker container monitoring widgets for at-a-glance host status
  • Single Go binary, YAML configuration, no database, very low memory footprint
  • Customizable layouts, themes with an in-UI theme picker, and a responsive mobile-friendly design
  • Optional username/password authentication with password hashing and Docker secrets support
  • Search widget with bangs, keyboard shortcuts, a to-do widget and community-contributed custom widgets
Best for

Homelab users, self-hosters and small teams who want a fast, low-overhead start page or status dashboard that consolidates feeds, monitoring and bookmarks on resource-constrained hardware.

services: glance: image: glanceapp/glance volumes: - ../files/app/config/:/app/config - ../files/app/assets:/app/assets ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:8080' container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

branding: hide-footer: true logo-text: P
pages: - name: Home columns: - size: small widgets: - type: calendar
- type: releases show-source-icon: true repositories: - Dokploy/dokploy - n8n-io/n8n - Budibase/budibase - home-assistant/core - tidbyt/pixlet
- type: twitch-channels channels: - nmplol - extraemily - qtcinderella - ludwig - timthetatman - mizkif
- size: full widgets: - type: hacker-news
- type: videos style: grid-cards channels: - UC3GzdWYwUYI1ACxuP9Nm-eg - UCGbg3DjQdcqWwqOLHpYHXIg - UC24RSoLcjiNZbQcT54j5l7Q limit: 3
- type: rss limit: 10 collapse-after: 3 cache: 3h feeds: - url: https://daringfireball.net/feeds/main title: Daring Fireball
- size: small widgets: - type: weather location: Gansevoort, New York, United States show-area-name: false units: imperial hour-format: 12h
- type: markets markets: - symbol: SPY name: S&P 500 - symbol: VOO name: Vanguard - symbol: BTC-USD name: Bitcoin - symbol: ETH-USD name: Etherium - symbol: NVDA name: NVIDIA - symbol: AAPL name: Apple - symbol: MSFT name: Microsoft - symbol: GOOGL name: Google - symbol: AMD name: AMD - symbol: TSLA name: Tesla
